name: Olive Garden Florentine Lasagna
recipeIngredient: Marinara sauce or tomato-cream sauce as desired
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam spinach until tender, press out excess moisture, and chop coarsely.
2. Chop mushrooms and onions over medium-high heat until onions are tender; drain excess liquid and cool.
3. Mix ricotta cheese, 2/3 cup Parmesan, egg, salt, pepper, basil, and oregano in a large bowl.
4. Add cooled spinach mixture and mushroom-onion mixture to the cheese mixture and mix on low speed until just blended.
5. Cook lasagna according to package directions; rinse under cool water and drain thoroughly.
6. Place four lasagna noodles at the bottom of an 11x17-inch (inches) pan, overlapping slightly.
7. Top with 2 cups spinach filling.
8. Sprinkle with 1-1/2 cups shredded cheese and 1/3 cup Parmesan.
9. Repeat layering two more times and top with remaining four lasagna noodles.
10. Spread 1 cup marinara or tomato-cream sauce over the top and cover tightly with foil.
11. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C) and bake, covered, for 1 hour.
12. Remove from oven and keep warm at least 30 minutes before cutting.
13. Top with extra Parmesan cheese.
